task: Summarize the main components of a RAG system.

tool_calls.input: Summarize the main components of a RAG system.
Summarize the main components of a RAG system.
tool_calls.output: A RAG system consists of document chunking, embedding model, vector database, retriever, and generator. Its main components help access up-to-date information and reduce hallucination but depend strongly on retrieval quality (chunk_38). There is a conflict regarding the effectiveness of increasing top-k retrieval (chunk_0).

final_answer: A RAG system consists of document chunking, embedding model, vector database, retriever, and generator. Its main components help access up-to-date information and reduce hallucination but depend strongly on retrieval quality (chunk_38). There is a conflict regarding the effectiveness of increasing top-k retrieval (chunk_0).
